description: Style Note Love to colour block but tired of colour pop denims? Try jealous 21's shorts with a cute bow detail on the front! Designed to contour the hips and Fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on! It goes perfectly with your T-shirts and dressy tops. Style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels. Product Details Purple shorts with fold-over details on the hem, bow style fabric belt, loops at the waist band, button and zipper detail on the front, two patch pockets on the sides and two at the back Material and Care 98% cotton, 2% spandex Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Tumble dry low Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and wasit 26") is wearing a size 28
